selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.2% and 20-day momentum is 10.9%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 3.5% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.5%, downside volatility near 1.2%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.5%.
Volume confirmation is 6.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 3.6% versus SPY over 5 days and 1.2% versus the sector ETF.
No recent relevant news passed the filter, so the news layer stayed neutral and contributed less confidence.
Recent JPM company-news coverage was mostly broad market roundups or weakly direct mentions, so the company-news contribution was forced back to neutral.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.055 with low confidence.
